summary: Iter36 (haptic_combo in AI Companion) verified end-to-end. Backend: 4/4 tests pass — /me/agent/chat returns haptic_combo on sleep prompt; /me/agent/checkin validator coerces invalid pattern→auto and strips out-of-range frequency/soundscape/duration; valid combo persists intact; PRIOR_INSIGHTS now surfaces haptic_combo summary on follow-up chat. Frontend: card renders with HeartPulse gold icon (#C4A67A), metadata strip shows pattern · Hz · soundscape · duration, tap closes sheet, sets localStorage sf_haptic_prefs_v1 to {enabled:true,pattern:<pattern>}, activates Sleep Mode preset when duration_min matches a sleep duration. Regression: other suggestion kinds still use green Play icon.
critical_code_review_comments: applySuggestion ignores volume on haptic_combo soundscape (hard-coded 0.5) — not a bug but the LLM cannot suggest a softer/louder layer the way it can for kind='soundscape'.

_HAPTIC_DURATIONS backend tuple is (5,10,15,20,30,45,60,90) but AIAgentSheet only routes 30/60/120/240/480 to Sleep Mode. Validator allows 45/90 to pass through yet the frontend would just start audioEngine without a sleep timer — fine, but worth documenting that 45/90 won't get fade/Pro gating.

Init-script vibrate spy returned undefined window.__vibCalls in this run — likely a test harness timing quirk rather than a product issue, because sf_haptic_prefs_v1 was set correctly and Sleep Mode activated. If future tests need to assert navigator.vibrate, add a longer wait_for_function on window.__vibCalls.length > 0.
seed_data_creation: Per-test fixtures wipe agent_checkins for admin user before/after each test. No leftover seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter36 haptic_combo path is healthy. Pytest file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter36_haptic_combo.py (4 tests). UI verified: haptic_combo card uses HeartPulse gold icon, tap sets localStorage sf_haptic_prefs_v1 with correct pattern, closes sheet, activates Sleep Mode preset when duration is a sleep duration. Backend validator quietly strips bad pattern/frequency/soundscape/duration_min on /me/agent/checkin — useful guarantee. PRIOR_INSIGHTS message confirmed to include haptic_combo summary.
